content.full_text:
October 17, 2001

Kris Miller-Fisher, Councilmember
527 Woodland Drive
Sierra Madre, CA 91024

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-234

Dear Ms. Miller-Fisher:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 I am also in receipt of your letter dated October 5, 2001, withdrawing your original request for advice. We are now closing this file based on your request. Please feel free to submit a new request for advice if your circumstances change.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jody Feldman, Staff Counsel
Legal Division

JF:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-234

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
